pages.text: $(bold)This is the cozy half.$()$(br2)The pack ships somewhere around $(thing)eleven thousand decorative block variants$() across a dozen-plus decoration mods. Nobody is memorizing that.$(br2)JEI is the only sane way to browse. Type a mod name with $(thing)@$() to filter.

$(bold)The big ones.$()$(br2)$(item)Chipped$() — 11k+ variants of vanilla blocks.$(br)$(item)Handcrafted$() — 250+ furniture pieces.$(br)$(item)Supplementaries$() — jars, sconces, signposts, planters.$(br)$(item)Macaw's$() — paths, paintings, holidays, more.

$(bold)Building tools.$()$(br2)$(item)Diagonal Walls$() and $(item)Diagonal Windows$() let you break the grid.$(br)$(item)Double Doors$() pair vanilla doors.$(br)$(item)Mo Glass$() adds glass stairs and slabs.$(br)$(item)Beautify$() and $(item)Amendments$() round out vanilla building.

$(bold)Personal touches.$()$(br2)$(item)Camerapture$() — in-game camera; screenshots that hang on walls.$(br)$(item)Gallery$() — frame artwork properly.$(br)$(item)Antique Atlas$() — decorative hand-drawn map (and useful too).$(br)$(item)Simple Hats$() — wear something silly.
